anti_capture_rules: Ecology claims must include affected-community review when decisions affect place, water, land, energy, or restoration.
No AI-for-ecology claim may stand on intention without material evidence.

authority_lease.scope: Template authority for ecology seed exploration only.

build_plan.production_grade_definition: An ecology seed is production-grade only when site-level evidence, uncertainty, affected review, and decision relevance are explicit.

canon_conditions: The ecology seed improves material decision quality and preserves uncertainty.
compost_conditions: The ecology seed becomes green branding without site-level evidence.

strongest_objections: The claim may convert ecological complexity into AI branding.

failure_conditions: No site-level evidence or affected review exists for a material claim.
claim.scope: An ecology seed for decision-useful AI/ecology verification or restoration support.
success_conditions: Evidence can change a real ecological decision or restoration workflow.
claim.text: This ecology seed can route AI capacity toward verified ecological balance instead of sustainability theater.

commons_return.minimum_return: Data, methods, uncertainty notes, and local review records remain available where lawful and consented.

title: Ecology Seed Template
